profile.title: Profile Information
profile.subtitle: Update your name, email address, and profile photo.

avatar.title: Public avatar
avatar.subtitle: You can change your avatar here or remove the current avatar to revert to the default initials.
avatar.hint: The ideal image size is 192 × 192 pixels. The maximum file size allowed is 2 MB.

profile.name: Full Name

password.title: Change Password
password.subtitle: Use a strong, unique password at least 8 characters long.

tfa.title: Two-Factor Authentication
tfa.subtitle: Add an extra layer of security to your account using an authenticator app.
tfa.desc_enabled: Your account is protected with a second factor. You will be prompted for a code when logging in.
tfa.desc_disabled: When enabled, you will be prompted for a secure, random token during authentication.

sessions.title: Active Sessions
sessions.subtitle: Manage and log out your active sessions on other browsers and devices.
sessions.logout_hint: Enter your password to log out all other browser sessions.

danger.title: Delete Account
danger.subtitle: Permanently delete your account. This action cannot be undone and all data will be removed.
danger.warning: Once you delete your account there is no going back. Please make sure you are certain before proceeding.
danger.dialog_desc: This will permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
